faq.heading: Frequently Asked
faq.subtext: Everything you need to know before your appointment at Glitz & Glamour Studio.
faq.stillHaveQuestionsText: If you couldn't find the answer you were looking for, please refer to our thorough Studio Policies or contact us directly.
faq.morePoliciesText: Explore our other policies and guidelines below.
faq.q1_1: What is the difference between Gel & Acrylic?
faq.a1_1: Gel polish is cured under a UV/LED lamp and can last 2–3 weeks with a glossy finish. Acrylics are an extension applied over your natural nail for added length and strength, and are great if you want a dramatic look or struggle with nail growth.
faq.q1_2: How long does a manicure or pedicure take?
faq.a1_2: A basic manicure typically takes about 30–45 minutes, while a pedicure can take 45–60 minutes. If you're adding gel, acrylics, or nail art, plan for a little extra time!
faq.q1_3: How often should I get a fill for my acrylics?
faq.a1_3: We recommend regular two- to three-week fills to keep your natural nails healthy, prevent lifting, and maintain the structural integrity of the extension.
faq.q2_1: How long will my blowout last?
faq.a2_1: A professional blowout typically lasts 3–5 days depending on your hair type, activity level, and how you care for it. To extend your blowout, sleep on a silk pillowcase, avoid humidity, and use a dry shampoo at the roots as needed.
faq.q2_2: Do I need to wash my hair before my appointment?
faq.a2_2: If you're coming in for a formal up-do or dry styling, day-old unwashed hair usually holds pins and texture best. For standard cuts, blowouts, or color, we will wash it for you.
faq.q3_1: What do I wear for my wax appointment?
faq.a3_1: We recommend wearing loose, comfortable clothing (preferably cotton) to avoid friction or irritation on the freshly waxed skin after your appointment.
faq.q3_2: Should I shave before my waxing appointment?
faq.a3_2: No! Please let the hair grow out. Hair needs to be at least 1/4 inch long (about the size of a grain of rice) so the wax can properly grip and remove it.
faq.q3_3: Can I get waxed if I am using skincare medications?
faq.a3_3: No. You must be off Accutane for at least 6 months, and off topical retinoids (Retin-A, Differin, AHAs/BHAs) for at least 5-7 days prior to waxing to prevent skin lifting or tearing.
faq.q4_1: How do I prepare for my lash appointment?
faq.a4_1: Please arrive completely makeup-free around the eye area. Do not wear mascara, eyeliner, or use heavy oil-based eye creams prior to your appointment. A $15 makeup removal fee applies if deep cleaning is required.
faq.q4_2: How often do I need a lash fill?
faq.a4_2: To maintain a full look, we recommend coming in every 2 to 3 weeks. You must have at least 40% of your extensions remaining to qualify for a fill; otherwise it requires a full set.
faq.q4_3: Will my face be red after a facial?
faq.a4_3: Some mild pinkness is completely normal (especially if extractions were performed or active enzymes used) and usually subsides within a few hours. We always ensure you leave with soothing products and SPF!
